scripts.zip: npm run build && zip -r live-sandbox-editor.zip live-sandbox-editor
scripts.ci-check: tsgo --noEmit && biome check . && npm run build && composer validate --strict && composer validate --strict --working-dir=live-sandbox-editor && find live-sandbox-editor src -path 'live-sandbox-editor/vendor' -prune -o -name '*.php' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 php -l && composer lint:src
